questions.q: What was his role at Utiq?
What did he achieve at Microsoft?
Summarise his experience in solutions consulting.
What revenue growth did he deliver at Appnexus?

results.question: What was his role at Utiq?
results.answer: Head of Solution Consulting

results.question: What languages does he speak?
results.answer: Bilingual in French and English

results.question: What did he achieve at Microsoft?
results.answer:
- Initiated cross-device graph offering redesign leading to 8x increase in audience expansions into CTV channel and reducing infrastructure cost by $300k per year.
- Scoped and delivered Real-Time Data Provider capability as part of a cross-functional product team, contributing to $5M in secured revenue.
- Partnered with engineering to restructure identity processing architecture, bringing it back to our own data centres, reducing both cost and operational risk while enabling new product capabilities.
- Took ownership of a stalled publisher identity management feature, leading a full redesign of the API and UI to meet evolving client privacy and control requirements.

results.question: Summarise his experience in solutions consulting.
results.answer: Led and scaled a 15-person solutions consulting organisation supporting a $25M book of business, driving 20% year-on-year revenue growth through strategic partnerships and solution-led engagement with Tier 1 agencies and trading desks. Designed and implemented the team’s operating model, introducing role specialisation, engagement frameworks, and clearer alignment with sales to improve scalability and consistency across enterprise clients. Partnered with sales, product, and engineering leadership to drive go-to-market strategy, ensuring successful rollout and adoption of new platform capabilities. Expanded into new client segments by launching services tailored to agency trading desks, generating $3M in new business. Acted as senior technical stakeholder across key strategic accounts, leading complex integrations, product collaborations, and long-term partnership development. Coached and mentored consultants and managers, strengthening the leadership bench and supporting internal progression.

results.question: What revenue growth did he deliver at Appnexus?
results.answer: Drove 20% year-on-year revenue growth across multiple Tier 1 accounts ($15M)

results.question: Summarise his experience in solutions consulting.
results.answer: The individual has over 15 years of experience in solutions consulting, specializing in digital advertising, identity infrastructure, and consent technology. They have built and led a 15-person solutions consulting organization at Xandr, overseeing a $25M book of business and achieving 20% year-on-year revenue growth through partnerships with agencies and trading desks. Their experience includes defining operating models, engagement frameworks, and integration strategies, as well as coaching and mentoring teams. Currently, they are establishing the solutions consulting function at Utiq, leading pilot campaigns that achieved 40% incremental audience reach.

results.question: Summarise his experience in solutions consulting.
results.answer: He has 15 years of experience in solutions consulting, with a focus on digital advertising, identity infrastructure, and consent technology. He built and led a 15-person solutions consulting organisation at Xandr, overseeing a $25M book of business and delivering 20% year-on-year revenue growth through deep technical partnerships with agencies and independent trading desks. At Utiq, he joined at a pre-commercial stage to define and establish the UK solutions consulting function, including the operating model, engagement approach, and integration frameworks across publishers, platforms, and CTV partners. He also led the design of Utiq’s identity graph solution, combining technical architecture, privacy compliance, and partner integration with a commercially driven approach, and activated initial pilot campaigns achieving 40% incremental audience reach.
